hook.summary: A female UGC creator enthusiastically introduces Amikin Village while playing on her phone.
hook.visual_action: Split-screen showing a blonde woman reacting to gameplay on the top and active in-game combat on the bottom.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Esse jogo é o Amikin Village e é muito divertido. Você coleciona Amikins...

scene_flow: UGC creator introduces the game Amikin Village with a split-screen layout.
Gameplay footage shows a character battling a deer-like creature in a lush green field.
The character captures a creature and the creator explains the collection and building mechanics.
A transition to base-building gameplay showing resource gathering and village construction.
The creator expresses her addiction to the game while high-action combat against a boss creature is shown.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers who enjoy monster-collecting and base-building adventures.
